date_of_joining: January’26 (leaves will be provided for examinations)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship : 20 K per month Salary after 6 months Internship : CTC 5 to 7 LPA (In hand monthly – 41 K to 58 Kpm)
package_salary.bond: An employment bond of 2 years shall be effective from the date of confirmation as a full time employee post successful completion of the internship.

selection_process_steps: ● Technical Test - Programming Ability (Pen Paper Test)
